description: A guest checking out booked through a third-party website (e.g., Expedia) and needs to pay for incidental charges.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the guest's folio and confirm that the room and tax were prepaid through the third party.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the main charges are covered and only incidentals are due.

nodes.task_description: Present the guest with the list of incidental charges (e.g., room service, parking).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the outstanding balance.

nodes.task_description: Collect payment from the guest for the incidental charges.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the payment and provides the guest with a zero-balance receipt.
